title: Robin Faces Her Past — Part 5
description: Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, this part follows Nico Robin, Nami, Sanji, Luffy, Zoro. Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You indeed do possess hereditary genius!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: We've got a cake, too! A cake!!

summary: Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.
